title: TB-500
description: TB-500 is a synthetic version of thymosin beta-4, a naturally occurring peptide involved in tissue repair and regeneration. It promotes healing of injuries, reduces inflammation, and is popular among athletes for accelerating recovery.

research.title: Simultaneous quantification of TB-500 and its metabolites by UHPLC-Q-Exactive orbitrap MS/MS
research.summary: Study found that the metabolite Ac-LKKTE plays a more significant role in wound healing than TB-500 itself.

research.title: Investigation of in vitro/ex vivo TB-500 metabolism synthesis of relevant metabolites
research.summary: Research identified how TB-500 is metabolized in humans and horses, establishing detection methods for doping control.

research.title: Doping control analysis of TB-500 in equine urine and plasma by LC-MS
research.summary: Method developed to detect TB-500 misuse in horses, representing the first doping control research for equine sports.

research.title: Thymosin Beta-4 accelerates wound healing
research.summary: Study demonstrated that TB-500 significantly speeds healing by stimulating collagen production and cell migration.

sentiment.summary: Highly regarded for injury recovery and healing. Users with chronic injuries report significant improvements. Often stacked with BPC-157 for synergistic healing effects.

effects.label: Systemic Action:
effects.description: Benefits areas distant from injection site.

sideEffects.label: Lethargy:
sideEffects.description: Some report tiredness during healing process.

sideEffects.label: Unknown Long-Term:
sideEffects.description: Safety with chronic use not fully established.
